name: living_room
description: Cosy living room: sofa, coffee table, floor lamp and area rug
script:
import bpy

bpy.ops.object.select_all(action='DESELECT')

def box(name, sx, sy, sz, loc, parent=None):
    bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1, location=loc)
    o = bpy.context.active_object
    o.name = name
    o.scale = (sx, sy, sz)
    bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(scale=True)
    if parent: o.parent = parent
    return o

# Floor
floor = box('LR_Floor', 6.0, 5.0, 0.05, (0, 0, -0.025))

# Walls
box('LR_WallBack',  6.0, 0.15, 2.8, (0, -2.5, 1.4), floor)
box('LR_WallLeft',  0.15, 5.0, 2.8, (-3.0, 0, 1.4), floor)

# Sofa — seat + back + 2 arms
sofa_seat = box('Sofa_Seat', 1.80, 0.75, 0.22, (0, -1.5, 0.22), floor)
box('Sofa_Back',   1.80, 0.22, 0.55, (0, -1.85, 0.61), sofa_seat)
box('Sofa_ArmL',   0.22, 0.75, 0.35, (-0.90, -1.5, 0.35), sofa_seat)
box('Sofa_ArmR',   0.22, 0.75, 0.35, ( 0.90, -1.5, 0.35), sofa_seat)

# Coffee table
ct = box('CT_Top', 0.80, 0.45, 0.04, (0, -0.6, 0.42), floor)
for lx,ly in ((-0.36,-0.19),(0.36,-0.19),(-0.36,0.19),(0.36,0.19)):
    box(f'CT_Leg', 0.045, 0.045, 0.40, (lx, -0.6+ly, 0.20), ct)

# Floor lamp
lamp_base = box('Lamp_Base',  0.20, 0.20, 0.04, (1.6, -1.8, 0.02), floor)
lamp_pole = box('Lamp_Pole',  0.04, 0.04, 1.55, (1.6, -1.8, 0.80), lamp_base)
bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cone_add(radius1=0.28, radius2=0.05, depth=0.35,
    location=(1.6, -1.8, 1.66))
lamp_shade = bpy.context.active_object
lamp_shade.name = 'Lamp_Shade'
lamp_shade.parent = lamp_base

# Area rug
bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_plane_add(size=1, location=(0, -0.9, 0.002))
rug = bpy.context.active_object
rug.name = 'LR_Rug'
rug.scale = (2.2, 1.6, 1)
bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(scale=True)
rug.parent = floor

# --- Materials ---
# Floor: light oak
oak = bpy.data.materials.new('LR_Oak')
oak.use_nodes = True
oak.node_tree.nodes['Principled BSDF'].inputs['Base Color'].default_value=(0.72,0.52,0.28,1)
oak.node_tree.nodes['Principled BSDF'].inputs['Roughness'].default_value=0.65

# Sofa: teal fabric
teal = bpy.data.materials.new('LR_Teal')
teal.use_nodes = True
teal.node_tree.nodes['Principled BSDF'].inputs['Base Color'].default_value=(0.10,0.45,0.45,1)
teal.node_tree.nodes['Principled BSDF'].inputs['Roughness'].default_value=0.95
teal.node_tree.nodes['Principled BSDF'].inputs['Sheen Weight'].default_value=0.6

# Wall/ceiling: warm white
white = bpy.data.materials.new('LR_White')
white.use_nodes = True
white.node_tree.nodes['Principled BSDF'].inputs['Base Color'].default_value=(0.95,0.93,0.88,1)
white.node_tree.nodes['Principled BSDF'].inputs['Roughness'].default_value=0.85

# Lamp shade: warm emit
lamp_mat = bpy.data.materials.new('LR_Lamp')
lamp_mat.use_nodes = True
lamp_mat.node_tree.nodes['Principled BSDF'].inputs['Base Color'].default_value=(0.9,0.82,0.6,1)
lamp_mat.node_tree.nodes['Principled BSDF'].inputs['Emission Color'].default_value=(0.9,0.82,0.6,1)
lamp_mat.node_tree.nodes['Principled BSDF'].inputs['Emission Strength'].default_value=1.5

# Rug: burgundy
rug_mat = bpy.data.materials.new('LR_Rug')
rug_mat.use_nodes = True
rug_mat.node_tree.nodes['Principled BSDF'].inputs['Base Color'].default_value=(0.55,0.10,0.15,1)
rug_mat.node_tree.nodes['Principled BSDF'].inputs['Roughness'].default_value=0.99
rug_mat.node_tree.nodes['Principled BSDF'].inputs['Sheen Weight'].default_value=0.8

mat_map = {
    'LR_Floor': oak, 'LR_WallBack': white, 'LR_WallLeft': white,
    'Sofa_Seat': teal, 'Sofa_Back': teal, 'Sofa_ArmL': teal, 'Sofa_ArmR': teal,
    'Lamp_Shade': lamp_mat, 'LR_Rug': rug_mat,
}
for o in bpy.data.objects:
    if not o.data or not hasattr(o.data, 'materials'): continue
    mat = mat_map.get(o.name)
    if mat:
        o.data.materials.clear()
        o.data.materials.append(mat)

floor.name = 'LivingRoom'
print('SCRIPT_DONE: LivingRoom created')
